description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the default Docker image and runs a before_script installing python-pip with `apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq python-pip` followed by `pip install platformio`. Define a single job called linux (in the default stage) that executes two PlatformIO CI commands: `platformio ci --lib="." --board=nodemcuv2 examples/basic/basic.ino -O "build_flags = -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -Werror"` and `platformio ci --lib="." --board=esp32dev examples/basic/basic.ino -O "build_flags = -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -Werror -std=c++14"`. No caches, artifacts, services, or conditional rules are specified.
